title: Ring of Extremes resolve hit by custom outcome table

card.rawText: When the equipped creature rolls to hit, ignore its Hit Modifier and the target's AL. Use the following outcomes instead: 1-8: Critical Fail. 9-12: Critical Hit. 13+: Normal Hit.

effect.value: Ignore Hit Modifier and target AL; use custom outcome table

plan.title: Ring of Extremes resolve hit by custom outcome table
